text.message: I did a nb so I can be unblocked for the first time lol

Games not even trying to make it fair lol
How many times do I have to ask?

I repeat. The games not even trying to make it fair
im at 3! black at 4 with city + 2 dev
I think they’re friends granted the early 4 sheep block too

and green, blue is your wife?

all that manipulation working out and 11s
